sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72735" key="oi)wnoskopei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰωνοσκοπ-εῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n72735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place where auguries are taken,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:16:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.16.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
